languages.text: {n}Нунциус не издает ни звука, устремив визор куда-то мимо вас.{/n}
{n}Nuncius does not make a sound, directing his visor somewhere past you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Нунциус не издает ни звука, устремив визор куда-то мимо вас.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヌンシウスは音を立てず、あなたの先をバイザーで向いている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius does not make a sound, directing his visor somewhere past you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius macht kein Geräusch und schaut mit seinem Visor an dir vorbei.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius does not make a sound, directing his visor somewhere past you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius macht kein Geräusch und schaut mit seinem Visor an dir vorbei.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius no emite sonido alguno, y su visor ni siquiera parece enfocarte.{/n}

languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius does not make a sound, directing his visor somewhere past you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sans produire le moindre son, Nuncius pointe son viseur quelque part derrière vous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sans produire le moindre son, Nuncius pointe son viseur quelque part derrière vous.{/n}

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯未发出任何声响，只是将目镜转向你身后某处。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius does not make a sound, directing his visor somewhere past you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯未发出任何声响，只是将目镜转向你身后某处。{/n}
